Growth OpportunitiesConversion FlowsJourney EventsConnect Data

FLOWSENSE - DATA CONNECTION

Connect Your Product Data

Ingest real user behavior to power your conversion intelligence.

System Ingestion

Create Access Key

Generate secure keys to connect your product events to FlowSense.

System Registry

Access Registry

Manage credentials used by your event pipelines.

Loading API keys...

System Module

SDK Initialization Module

Start tracking and uncover conversion issues in minutes.

Install FlowSense

<script src="https://flowsense-five.vercel.app/flowsense-sdk.js"></script>

Initialize

FlowSense.init({
  apiKey: "fs_live_xxx",
  endpoint: "https://flowsense-five.vercel.app/api/ingest"
});

Track Example

FlowSense.track("/home");

Drop-In Snippet

<script src="https://flowsense-five.vercel.app/flowsense-sdk.js"></script>
<script>
  FlowSense.init({
    apiKey: "fs_live_xxx",
    endpoint: "https://flowsense-five.vercel.app/api/ingest"
  });

  FlowSense.track("/home");
</script>
View this event in your dashboard
